overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in winter survival gear walking through a dark, snowy alien landscape at night. The character navigates rocky terrain illuminated by a flashlight, approaching and passing glowing white crystalline formations with dark spiky structures visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien snow field with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward distant glowing white formations

entered.detail: large gray boulder partially covered in snow
glowing white crystalline structures visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy landscape at night, illuminated by a flashlight. Large rock outcrops flank the path while distant glowing white crystalline formations are visible ahead against the dark cloudy sky.

events.description: character walks past large glowing white crystalline structures

agents.ego_description: navigating between towering luminous crystal formations

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a field of large, glowing white crystalline formations that illuminate the surrounding snow. The rocks from the previous area recede into the distance as the character moves deeper among the crystals.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow plain with dark crystalline spires

events.description: dark spiky crystalline structures become visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing across open snow field toward distant dark formations

entered.detail: tall dark crystalline spires contrasting with the white snow

segments.scene_description: Having passed the white crystals, the character enters a more open snow plain where dark, spiky crystalline formations become prominent on the right side. The terrain remains flat and snow-covered as the character continues toward the distant dark structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, snowy alien landscape that transitions from a rocky wilderness into a field of luminous crystals and finally toward jagged dark spires. It begins with the character navigating a wide-open snowy expanse at night, guided by a flashlight as large rock outcrops flank the path. As the character advances, the rocky terrain recedes and the scene shifts into a dense field of glowing white crystalline formations that cast a bright light across the surrounding snow. The camera then moves beyond the white glow and opens onto a flat snow plain, where the environment transforms again to reveal prominent, dark spiky crystalline structures rising on the right. The movement concludes as the character continues across the frozen terrain toward these distant, ominous formations under a cloudy night sky.
